properties.remark: HIGHWAY 50 WAS CLOSED FROM SYRACUSE TO LAKIN BECAUSE OF NEAR ZERO VISIBILITY AND MULTIPLE ACCIDENTS DUE TO SIGNIFICANT BLOWING DUST.
COUNTY SHERIFF REPORTED WIDESPREAD HALF MILE VISIBILITY WITH LOCALLY QUARTER MILE OR LESS VISIBILITY DUE TO SIGNIFICANT BLOWING DUST ALONG HIGHWAY 160 SOUTHWEST OF JOHNSON.
OPEN AREAS AROUND LAKIN HAD VISIBILITY NEAR ZERO IN SIGNIFICANT BLOWING DUST, BASED ON SOCIAL MEDIA REPORT.
COUNTY ROADS WERE DESCRIBED AS BEING UNDRIVABLE DUE TO THE EXTREMELY POOR VISIBILITY FROM SIGNIFICANT BLOWING DUST.
